Self.Wiki: Defines parameters relating to the camera during boss fights.

cameraType.Wiki: The behavior to use for this camera.

cameraBasePosType.Wiki: The reference point to use for this camera.

hitCollision.Wiki: The collision size of the camera.

targetOffsetX.Wiki: The reference point position offset on the x-axis (in metres).

targetOffsetY.Wiki: The reference point position offset on the y-axis (in metres).

targetOffsetZ.Wiki: The reference point position offset on the z-axis (in metres).

distance.Wiki: The distance the camera is pushed back from the reference point (in metres).

lrMoveDistanceMax.Wiki: The maximum distance (in metres) of the horizontal movement distance ratio for the camera.

lrMoveRateMin.Wiki: The minimum distance rate for the horizontal movement distance ratio used by the camera.

lrMoveRateMax.Wiki: The maximum distance rate for the horizontal movement distance ratio used by the camera.

transChaseRate.Wiki: The camera position tracking rate on the x-axis for character.

transChaseRateEscapeWall.Wiki: The camera position tracking rate on the x-axis for charactert.

targetTransChaseRate.Wiki: The camera position tracking rate on the x-axis for a target.

targetRotXChaseRate.Wiki: The camera rotation tracking rate on the x-axis for a target.

targetChaseRateXZForNormal.Wiki: The camera tracking rate on normalized x/z-axis for a target.

targetChaseRateXZForEscapeWall.Wiki: The camera tracking rate on normalized x/z-axis for a target.

targetChaseRateY.Wiki: The camera position tracking rate on the y-axis for a target.

targetChaseRateMinAng.Wiki: The minimum angle (in degrees) when tracking on the y-axis for a target.

targetChaseRateMaxAng.Wiki: The maximum angle (in degrees) when tracking on the y-axis for a target.

targetChaseDistRate.Wiki: The camera distance tracking rate for a target.

targetChaseRateAtLockXZ.Wiki: The camera tracking rate on x/z-axis for a locked target..

targetChaseRateAtLockY.Wiki: The camera tracking rate on y-axis for a locked target..

targetChaseRateMinAngAtLock.Wiki: The minimum tracking angle (in degrees), for a locked target.

targetChaseRateMaxAngAtLock.Wiki: The maximum tracking angle (in degrees), for a locked target.

transChaseByCtrlEndWaitTime.Wiki: The position tracking wait duration (in seconds) after operation completion.

transChaseByCtrlEndReleaseTime.Wiki: The position tracking release duration (in seconds) after operation completion.

rotCtrlEndWaitTime.Wiki: The rotation tracking wait duration (in seconds) after operation completion.

rotCtrlEndReleaseTime.Wiki: The rotation tracking release duration (in seconds) after operation completion.

rotHiSpeedRateIncTime.Wiki: The increase time (in seconds) for high speed rotation rate.

rotRangeMinX.Wiki: The minimum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation.

rotRangeMaxX.Wiki: The maximum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation.

rotRangeMinXAtLock.Wiki: The minimum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation when locked-on.

rotRangeMaxXAtLock.Wiki: The maximum value (in degrees) of the x-axis rotation when locked-on.

rotRangeLerpBeginHeight.AltName: Lock-on Rotation: X-Axis - Interpolation Start Height
rotRangeLerpBeginHeight.Wiki: The interpolation lerp start height (in metres) during lock-on x-axis rotation.

rotRangeLerpEndHeight.AltName: Lock-on Rotation: X-Axis - Interpolation End Height
rotRangeLerpEndHeight.Wiki: The interpolation lerp end height (in metres) during lock-on x-axis rotation.

rotSpeedX_Min.Wiki: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the x-axis rotation.

rotSpeedX_Max.Wiki: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the x-axis rotation.

rotSpeedY_Min.Wiki: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the y-axis rotation.

rotSpeedY_Max.Wiki: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the y-axis rotation.

rotHiSpeedX_Min.AltName: High Speed Rotation: X-Axis - Minimum Speed
rotHiSpeedX_Min.Wiki: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the high speed x-axis rotation.

rotHiSpeedX_Max.AltName: High Speed Rotation: X-Axis - Maximum Speed
rotHiSpeedX_Max.Wiki: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the high speed x-axis rotation.

rotHiSpeedY_Min.AltName: High Speed Rotation: Y-Axis - Minimum Speed
rotHiSpeedY_Min.Wiki: The minimum speed (in degrees per second) for the high speed y-axis rotation.

rotHiSpeedY_Max.AltName: High Speed Rotation: Y-Axis - Maximum Speed
rotHiSpeedY_Max.Wiki: The maximum speed (in degrees per second) for the high speed y-axis rotation.

directPitchAng.Wiki: The direct pitching angle of the camera (in degrees).

directPitchRate.Wiki: The direct pitching rate of the camera.

lockRotChaseRate.Wiki: The lock-on rotation tracking rate for the camera.

lockRotChasePlayAng.Wiki: The lock-on rotation tracking play angle (in degrees) for the camera.

lockRotXShiftRatio.Wiki: The shift rate of the lock-on rotation for the camera.

forceFrontLockTime.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) of the forced forward lock for the camera.

updateTargetRotXByLock.AltName: Update Target X-Axis Rotation on Lock
updateTargetRotXByLock.Wiki: If enabled, the target x-axis rotation is updated upon camera lock.

updateTargetRotXByFrontLock.AltName: Update Target X-Axis Rotation on Forward Lock
updateTargetRotXByFrontLock.Wiki: If enabled, the target x-axis rotation is updated upon camera forward lock.

enableLockCamAdjust.Wiki: If enabled, lock adjustments are applied to the camera

lockCamAdjustRotX_Max.Wiki: The maximum value (in degrees) of x-axis rotation applied via lock camera adjustments.

lockCamAdjustRotY_Max.Wiki: The maximum value (in degrees) of y-axis rotation applied via lock camera adjustments.

lockCamAdjustRotChaseRate.Wiki: The rotation trackin rate of the lock camera adjustments.

escapeWallRotAddY.Wiki: The y-axis rotation (in degrees per second) added during wall avoidance for this camera.

escapeWallRotMaxY.Wiki: The y-axis rotation (in degrees per second) maximum used during wall avoidance for this camera.

escapeWallRotDampRatio.Wiki: The rotation decay rate of rotation adjustments during wall avoidance.

escapeWallWingAngY.Wiki: The wing angle (in degrees) used during wall avoidance.

escapeWallWingLen.Wiki: The wing length (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

escapeWallWingRadius.Wiki: The wing radius (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

escapeWallWingSeparate.Wiki: The wing spacing (in metres) used during wall avoidance.

resetMinTime.Wiki: The minimum duration (in seconds) for camera reset.

resetMaxTime.Wiki: The maximum duration (in seconds) for camera reset.

resetSpeedChangeRate.Wiki: The camera reset speed change rate for this camera.

parameterApplyTime.Wiki: The duration (in seconds) for parameter application for this camera.

transChaseRateLock.Wiki: The position tracking rate used by the camera when a character is locked-on.

targetChaseDistRateLock.Wiki: The position tracking rate used by the camera when a target is locked-on.

lockRotChaseRateMaxTime.Wiki: The tracking rate application time (in seconds) during lock-on rotation.

useRotationBrake.Wiki: If enabled, rotation brake may be used.

useRotationBrakeReverseAdjust.Wiki: If enabled, reverse brake correction may be used.

rotaitionBrakeTimeNormalSpeedX.AltName: Rotation Brake: X-Axis Rotation Brake Time
rotaitionBrakeTimeNormalSpeedX.Wiki: The braking time (in seconds) for brake action on the x-axis.

rotationBrakeAddTimelHighSpeedX.AltName: Rotation Brake: High Speed X-Axis Rotation Brake Time
rotationBrakeAddTimelHighSpeedX.Wiki: The braking time (in seconds) for brake action on the high speed x-axis.

rotaitionBrakeTimeNormalSpeedY.AltName: Rotation Brake: Y-Axis Rotation Brake Time
rotaitionBrakeTimeNormalSpeedY.Wiki: The braking time (in seconds) for brake action on the y-axis.

rotationBrakeAddTimelHighSpeedY.AltName: Rotation Brake: High Speed Y-Axis Rotation Brake Time
rotationBrakeAddTimelHighSpeedY.Wiki: The braking time (in seconds) for brake action on the high speed y-axis.
